sections.title: If the player has sulphurous fertiliser

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: The people of Hosidius require sulphurous fertiliser for the farms. I see you have [number] buckets here, and [number] more in the bank. We require [number] buckets.

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: Do you wish to donate your fertiliser? We'll take what we need directly from your bank.

sections.title: If the player has no sulphurous fertiliser

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: The people of Hosidius require sulphurous fertiliser for the farms. We currently require [number] buckets. Do come back if you every get any you'd be willing to donate.

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: If you were planning to bring any fertiliser for the stores, please try again later. The stores are very full at present.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's alright, I haven't brought any.
